fields.label: Personal API Token
fields.helpText: From CircleCI -> User Settings -> Personal API Tokens

healthcheck_config.description: Validates token via CircleCI me endpoint

metadata.summary: CircleCI continuous integration and delivery platform.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to CircleCI -> User Settings -> Personal API Tokens
2. Click 'Create New Token'
3. Name your token and click 'Add API Token'
4. Copy the CCIPAT_... value and paste it here
